zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Pecche於1220年12月11日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne28歲，母親Eve de Peverell26歲。他於1239年與Maud Hastings在英國諾福爾可阿希爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1291年5月25日在英國肯特多福享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Pecche于1220年12月11日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne28岁，母亲Eve de Peverell26岁。他于1239年与Maud Hastings在英国諾福爾可阿希爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1291年5月25日在英国肯特多福享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特多福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pecche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Pecche was born on 11 December 1220, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne, was 28 and his mother, Eve de Peverell, was 26. He married Maud Hastings in 1239, in Ashill, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 May 1291, in Dover, Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Dover, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Pecche est né le 11 décembre 1220, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eve de Peverell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Maud Hastings en 1239, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1291, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Dover, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Pecche am 11. Dezember 1220 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne 28 und seine Mutter Eve de Peverell 26. Er hat 1239 in Ashill, Norfolk, England Maud Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1291 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Dover, Kent, England und wurde in Dover, Kent, England begraben.

Lui sposato Maud Hastings nel 1239, nel Ashill, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 maggio 1291, nel Dover, Kent, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Dover, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Peccheが1220年12月11日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourneは28歳，母Eve de Peverellは26歳であった。1239年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルでMaud Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1291年5月25日にイギリスケントドバーで70歳で死去し，イギリスケントドバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Pecche(이)가 1220년 12월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eve de Peverell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1239년 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 Maud Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1291년 5월 25일 영국 켄트 도버에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 도버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Pecche nasceu em 11 de dezembro de 1220, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Peverell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Hastings em 1239, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1291, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Pecche родился 11 декабря 1220 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hamon De Pecche II Baron Of Bourne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve de Peverell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Hastings в 1239 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 мая 1291 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности довир, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Maud Hastings en 1239, en Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1291, en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra.
